title: cyclophorus obovatus
intro: Cyclophorus obovatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyclophoraceae, commonly known as the Cyclophorus obovatus. It is a type of orchid native to tropical regions of Asia, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Cyclophorus obovatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
